task_completion.description: Verify the agent has opened the 'Household Financial Wellness 2025' survey in the LimeSurvey admin interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LimeSurvey admin interface is visible with the survey title 'Household Financial Wellness 2025' displayed in the header or survey list.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has navigated to the edit or logic settings page for the 'Q_EXPENSES' question.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The question editor, settings panel, or logic panel is open, clearly showing 'Q_EXPENSES' as the active question being modified.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has entered the correct validation equation to ensure the sum of expenses does not exceed income.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Question validation equation' (or similar logic input field) contains an equation like 'sum(Q_EXPENSES) <= Q_INCOME' or equivalent logic using summation and '<=' operators.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has entered the required dynamic validation tip.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Question validation tip' input field contains the text: 'Total expenses cannot exceed your reported income of {Q_INCOME}.'

task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully saved the configured question settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Question saved' success notification is visible, or the updated validation equation and tip are visible in the saved question overview/logic summary screen.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the LimeSurvey web graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser with the LimeSurvey admin interface, not a terminal executing API scripts or database commands.

integrity.description: Verify the validation equation and tip were entered into the actual LimeSurvey application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text inputs for the equation and tip are inside the LimeSurvey question settings form, not in a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Verify the interface has not been artificially modified using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no open browser developer tools (Elements/Console tabs) used to fake success messages or inject text into the page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Survey Title: 'Household Financial Wellness 2025'. Target Question to edit: 'Q_EXPENSES'. Reference Question for validation: 'Q_INCOME'. The validation equation must use summation and comparison operators (e.g., sum(Q_EXPENSES) <= Q_INCOME). The validation tip must contain the exact fragment 'cannot exceed' and dynamically reference the income using '{Q_INCOME}'.
